display_information.name: Precedent
display_information.description: Decision memory for your team. Ask what was decided and get receipts.

assistant_view.assistant_description: Precedent watches your channels for decisions, logs them with links to the source thread, and answers questions like "what did we decide about X?" with receipts.

suggested_prompts.title: What did we decide?
suggested_prompts.message: What did we decide about the email vendor?

suggested_prompts.title: Open action items
suggested_prompts.message: What action items are still open?

suggested_prompts.title: This week's decisions
suggested_prompts.message: Summarize the decisions made this week.
